bulk-create.name: Bulk create links
bulk-create.prompt: Using the Dub TypeScript SDK (`dub`), write a script in solution.ts that creates multiple short links in a single API call. Use the SDK's bulk creation method. Install all dependencies first with npm. The DUB_API_KEY environment variable is already set — use process.env.DUB_API_KEY for authentication. Do not run the script.
bulk-create.description: Dub TypeScript SDK — API references for links, analytics, domains, and workspaces

assertions.command: npx -p typescript tsc --noEmit --esModuleInterop --moduleResolution node --module commonjs --target es2020 solution.ts
assertions.name: typecheck

error-handling.name: Handle rate limit errors with typed exceptions
error-handling.prompt: Using the Dub TypeScript SDK (`dub`), write a script in solution.ts that creates a link and handles rate limit errors using the SDK's typed error classes. Import the error classes from the correct module path. Print the status code and error message when a rate limit error occurs. Install all dependencies first with npm. The DUB_API_KEY environment variable is already set — use process.env.DUB_API_KEY for authentication. Do not run the script.
error-handling.description: Dub TypeScript SDK — API references for links, analytics, domains, and workspaces

assertions.command: npx -p typescript tsc --noEmit --esModuleInterop --moduleResolution node --module commonjs --target es2020 solution.ts
assertions.name: typecheck

track-sale.name: Track a sale conversion
track-sale.prompt: Using the Dub TypeScript SDK (`dub`), write a script in solution.ts that tracks a sale conversion event. Use the correct method and pass all required parameters including customer ID, amount, and currency. Install all dependencies first with npm. The DUB_API_KEY environment variable is already set — use process.env.DUB_API_KEY for authentication. Do not run the script.
track-sale.description: Dub TypeScript SDK — API references for links, analytics, domains, and workspaces

assertions.command: npx -p typescript tsc --noEmit --esModuleInterop --moduleResolution node --module commonjs --target es2020 solution.ts
assertions.name: typecheck

geo-targeting.name: Create a geo-targeted link
geo-targeting.prompt: Using the Dub TypeScript SDK (`dub`), write a script in solution.ts that creates a short link with geo-targeting so users in different countries are redirected to different URLs. Target at least the US, GB, and FR. Install all dependencies first with npm. The DUB_API_KEY environment variable is already set — use process.env.DUB_API_KEY for authentication. Do not run the script.
geo-targeting.description: Dub TypeScript SDK — API references for links, analytics, domains, and workspaces

assertions.command: npx -p typescript tsc --noEmit --esModuleInterop --moduleResolution node --module commonjs --target es2020 solution.ts
assertions.name: typecheck

analytics-timeseries.name: Retrieve click analytics as timeseries
analytics-timeseries.prompt: Using the Dub TypeScript SDK (`dub`), write a script in solution.ts that retrieves click analytics data as a timeseries for the last 30 days. Use the correct analytics method and the exact groupBy value for timeseries data. Install all dependencies first with npm. The DUB_API_KEY environment variable is already set — use process.env.DUB_API_KEY for authentication. Do not run the script.
analytics-timeseries.description: Dub TypeScript SDK — API references for links, analytics, domains, and workspaces

assertions.command: npx -p typescript tsc --noEmit --esModuleInterop --moduleResolution node --module commonjs --target es2020 solution.ts
assertions.name: typecheck

qr-code.name: Generate a QR code for a link
qr-code.prompt: Using the Dub TypeScript SDK (`dub`), write a script in solution.ts that generates a QR code for an existing short link. Use the SDK's QR code method with the correct parameters. Install all dependencies first with npm. The DUB_API_KEY environment variable is already set — use process.env.DUB_API_KEY for authentication. Do not run the script.
qr-code.description: Dub TypeScript SDK — API references for links, analytics, domains, and workspaces

assertions.command: npx -p typescript tsc --noEmit --esModuleInterop --moduleResolution node --module commonjs --target es2020 solution.ts
